responsibilities: • prepare and file gst returns (gstr -1, 3b, annual returns)   • manage g st reconciliations and input tax credit   • advise clients on gst classification and compliance   • handle gst notices and departmental communication   • support gst audits and assessments   • maintain accurate gst records
qualifications: • ca / gst practitioner reg istered under gst law   • strong understanding of gst rules and compliance   • detail -oriented approach
